name: OpenThesaurus
description: Get synonmns for German words using the OpenThesaurus API

endpoints.label: Get Synonyms

fields.label: Text
fields.description: The word to get synonyms for

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: baseform, similar, startswith, substring, substringFromResults, substringMaxResults, subsynsets, supersynsets)

endpoints.description: Get synonyms for a German word in German
